tasks.intent:
Extract boat listing details from BoatTrader PRIVATE SELLER results.

You are on the private sellers page (by-owner). These are individual sellers, not dealers.

HOW TO IDENTIFY PRIVATE SELLER LISTINGS:
- The search results page shows 'Boats for sale by owner'
- Each listing card shows: boat photo, Year Make Model title, price, location
- Private seller listings say 'Private Seller' under the location
- If you see 'More From This Dealer' or 'View Dealer Website' on a detail page, you clicked a DEALER listing — go back immediately

WHAT TO CLICK:
- LISTING TITLE TEXT: Blue hyperlinked text showing 'Year Make Model' below the photo
- NEVER click the large boat PHOTO — opens fullscreen gallery trap

WHAT TO NEVER CLICK:
- Large boat PHOTOS or thumbnails — opens '1 of N' gallery
- 'Contact Seller' buttons — opens popup form, wastes steps
- 'Request Info' buttons — opens popup form
- Social media icons in footer
- Dealer/brand logos or navigation menus
- Condition pills (All/New/Used) — these CHANGE THE URL and lose the private seller filter

STEPS FOR EACH LISTING:
1. Find a listing card showing 'Private Seller' label
2. click() on the TITLE TEXT (not the photo)
3. IMMEDIATELY read the URL from the browser address bar: boattrader.com/boat/year-make-model-id/
4. scroll(direction='down', amount=5) AGGRESSIVELY past the photo gallery
5. Look for Description or Seller Notes section — this is where phone numbers appear
6. Phone formats: (305)555-1234, 786-555-1234, 305.555.5678 — must be 10+ digits
7. NOT phone numbers: prices ($45,000), years (2020), zip codes (33101)
8. Extract: Year, Make, Model, Price, Phone (or none), Seller Name, URL
9. key_press(keys='alt+left') to return to search results
10. VERIFY you're back on the 'by-owner' results page before clicking next listing

DEALER DETECTION:
- If detail page shows 'More From This Dealer' or 'View Dealer Website' — this is a DEALER listing, not private seller
- Press Alt+Left immediately, skip it, try the next listing
- Do NOT waste steps scrolling dealer pages for phone numbers — they never have them

OUTPUT FORMAT — fill in ALL fields:
done(success=true, summary='Year: 2018 | Make: Sea Ray | Model: 240 Sundeck | Price: $42,500 | Phone: 305-555-1234 | Seller: John Smith | URL: boattrader.com/boat/2018-sea-ray-240-sundeck-12345/')

If no phone: done(success=true, summary='Year: 2018 | Make: Sea Ray | Model: 240 Sundeck | Price: $42,500 | Phone: none | Seller: not shown | URL: boattrader.com/boat/2018-sea-ray-240-sundeck-12345/')

Do NOT output template text like 'Year: <from title>' — output actual values.

ERROR HANDLERS:
- Photo gallery ('1 of N') → key_press(keys='Escape'), key_press(keys='alt+left')
- 404 page → key_press(keys='alt+left'), done(summary='SKIPPED | 404')
- Off-site navigation → key_press(keys='alt+left') immediately
- Dealer listing detected → key_press(keys='alt+left'), done(summary='SKIPPED | dealer listing')
- Footer reached, no more listings → done(success=false, summary='no more listings on this page')

loop.pagination_intent: Scroll to the bottom of the results page and click 'Next' or the next page number. If no Next button visible, pagination is complete.
